description: Foundation model for fluorescein angiography (FA) and ICG angiography (ICGA) classification across 24 APTOS 2023 retinal conditions

dataset.name: APTOS 2023 FA+ICGA
dataset.staging_status: NOT YET STAGED on Discovery HPC
dataset.access: competition dataset; verify license before redistribution

results.note: AUC on synthetic random-label data is not meaningful; pipeline is verified end-to-end

known_limitations.R8_coral_conditions: CORALHead applied to all 24 conditions; not all APTOS conditions have a single ordinal severity ordering — audit required when real data staged
known_limitations.R9_probe_imbalance: linear_probe_eval supports n_labeled_per_class equalization (optional param); set when real data is imbalanced
known_limitations.R2_temporal: temporal ordering (early/late phase) not validated — requires real FA/ICGA sequences
known_limitations.R3_registration: FA-ICGA cross-modal registration not validated — requires real paired images
known_limitations.R5_rater_agreement: multi-rater agreement statistics unavailable — requires real annotation metadata
